commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh That in the day that I shall punish the transgressions of Israel upon him I will also punish the altars of Bethel: and the horns of the altar shall be cut off, and fall to the ground. Mana hem seems to have sent one of the calves to engage Phul to come to his assistance, Osee x. , and 4 Kings xv. Salmanasar had both, Osee viii. Josias afterwards defiled the profane altars, 4 Kings xxiii. Horns, made of brass, which the Assyrians carried off. (Calmet) The fairest possessions of sinners will at last perish. (Worthington).
